title: Markets Rise at Midday, on Track for a Monthly Gain on Profits, Lower Inflation
text: U.S. equities advanced at midday on Monday, July 31, 2023, heading for a winning month on strong earnings and easing inflation.

title: Gramercy Products and Hasbro Debut the Innovative NERF DOG Glow Line, Available Now Exclusively at PetSmart
text: SECAUCUS, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Gramercy Products expands popular NERF DOG portfolio with the NERF DOG Glow line, now available in-store and online exclusively at PetSmart.

title: Hasbro: High Yield, Bargain Price
text: Will people still buy toys during economic downturns? Yes, absolutely.

title: Thanks Barbie! 3 Toy Stocks Worth Playing as Dolls Make a Comeback.
text: Thanks to the much-anticipated release of the film “Barbie,” top toy stocks – in particular Barbie creator Mattel (NASDAQ: MAT ) – have enjoyed significant interest. For MAT stock, it bounced up nearly 17% since the start of the year.

title: Hasbro to Announce Second Quarter 2023 Earnings on August 3, 2023
text: PAWTUCKET, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $HAS #HASQ2--Hasbro to Announce Second Quarter 2023 Earnings on August 3, 2023.

title: F-150 Lightning Price Cut: A Boon for Tesla?
text: Ford (F) announced it is lowering the price of its F-150 Lightning EV pickup truck, by $6K-$10K, depending on the model.

title: Lionsgate In Pole Position On Entertainment One Acquisition: The Dish
text: EXCLUSIVE: Lionsgate has established pole position to acquire the Hasbro-owned Entertainment One, sources tell Deadline. Since Hasbro declared it was shedding all but its core business, Lionsgate has been oft-mentioned as a suitor, as has Legendary.

title: Hasbro (HAS) Gears Up for Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Hasbro (HAS) second-quarter 2023 results are likely to be affected by the dismal performance of Partners Brands and Hasbro Gaming.

title: Is a Surprise Coming for Hasbro (HAS) This Earnings Season?
text: Hasbro (HAS) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: Hasbro (HAS) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: Can the Stock Move Higher?
text: Hasbro (HAS) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
